text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way to the track, I am intercepted by a
visibly chipper Taiki Shuttle.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Get a load of this, Trainer! I just got invited to go
partner runnin' again!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah, your fault! The gal who asked said she could learn a lot from me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
She was keen on finding out how I spiced up my
runnin' so much!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So I told her it was your fault for expanding my
horizons!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You taught me about a world where speed alone
won't score ya wins. Now I get flutters thinkin'
about how to overcome it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been able to cool off since the day we
met, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm always burnin' up with passion...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You better take responsibility for lettin' me in on
something so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna forge this future of ours together!
Back out now, and I'm huntin' ya down! Bang!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I appreciate the thought, I should probably
do something about her choice of language
before someone gets the wrong idea.
